name: 麓下馆
description: 岳麓山下的别墅，易温的住所。三层结构，一层有大厅、餐厅、厨房，二层有卧室、书房，三层有客房。

visual.prompt: 1914 Chinese mansion near Yuelu Mountain, traditional architecture, oil painting style, dramatic lighting
